'''mapozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldster|oldster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldster|oldster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mapozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæpezheth|mæpezheth]] || [[word:mæpezhej|mæpezhej]] || [[word:mæpezhesh|mæpezhesh]] || [[word:mæpezhe|mæpezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapopozhoth|mapopozhoth]] || [[word:mapopozhoj|mapopozhoj]] || [[word:mapopozhosh|mapopozhosh]] || [[word:mapopozho|mapopozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapozhoth|mapozhoth]] || [[word:mapozhoj|mapozhoj]] || [[word:mapozhosh|mapozhosh]] || [[word:mapozho|mapozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapofzhoth|mapofzhoth]] || [[word:mapofzhoj|mapofzhoj]] || [[word:mapofzhosh|mapofzhosh]] || [[word:mapofzhof|mapofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mapozhotho|mapozhotho]] || [[word:mapozhojo|mapozhojo]] || [[word:mapozhosho|mapozhosho]] || [[word:mapozhoko|mapozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mapozhoth|mapozhoth]] || [[word:mapozhoj|mapozhoj]] || [[word:mapozhosh|mapozhosh]] || [[word:mapozho|mapozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mapozhothol|mapozhothol]] || [[word:mapozhojol|mapozhojol]] || [[word:mapozhoshol|mapozhoshol]] || [[word:mapozhokol|mapozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mapozhothotho|mapozhothotho]] || [[word:mapozhojojo|mapozhojojo]] || [[word:mapozhoshosho|mapozhoshosho]] || [[word:mapozhoko|mapozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mapozhothon|mapozhothon]] || [[word:mapozhojon|mapozhojon]] || [[word:mapozhoshon|mapozhoshon]] || [[word:mapozhokon|mapozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mapozhothoro|mapozhothoro]] || [[word:mapozhojoro|mapozhojoro]] || [[word:mapozhoshoro|mapozhoshoro]] || [[word:mapozhokoro|mapozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
